---

## Documentation Issue

Please describe the documentation issue or improvement request.

## Type of Documentation

- [ ] README
- [ ] Contributing Guide
- [ ] API Documentation
- [ ] Code Comments
- [ ] User Guide
- [ ] Architecture Documentation
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Current Documentation

If reporting an issue, paste or describe the current documentation that needs improvement.

## Suggested Improvement

Describe how the documentation should be improved. Be as specific as possible.

## Location

Where should this documentation be added or updated?

- File path:
- Section/Line number (if applicable):

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the documentation issue.

- [ ] I'm willing to submit a PR to improve the documentation
